docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY GONGORA, KARINA AS TO DEFENDANT SHERPA, LAMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BOTH ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. MEDIATED DISPOSITION. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---LUIS CASTILLO. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED SEP-24-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHERPA, LAMA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SHERPA, LAMA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GONGORA, KARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT SHERPA, LAMA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BOTH ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. MEDIATED DISPOSITION.
